prompt: A polygonal chain is a connected series of line segments whose length is defined as the sum of the lengths of the line segments it is made of. Which function $f$ represents the total length, in cm, of the extended polygonal chain after $x$ line segments are added?

subject: math
prompt: For a study, a group of chipmunks will be selected from a habitat consisting of 220 chipmunks, and a group of prairie dogs will be selected from a habitat consisting of 190 prairie dogs. Some of the chipmunks and prairie dogs will be in a treatment group, and some of the chipmunks and prairie dogs will be in a control group. Which of the following is necessary for this study to attempt to establish a cause-and-effect relationship between two variables?
questionText: For a study, a group of chipmunks will be selected from a habitat consisting of 220 chipmunks, and a group of prairie dogs will be selected from a habitat consisting of 190 prairie dogs. Some of the chipmunks and prairie dogs will be in a treatment group, and some of the chipmunks and prairie dogs will be in a control group. Which of the following is necessary for this study to attempt to establish a cause-and-effect relationship between two variables?

choices.text: The number of chipmunks in the treatment group is equal to the number of prairie dogs in the treatment group, and the number of chipmunks in the control group is equal to the number of prairie dogs in the control group.
The chipmunks and the prairie dogs are randomly assigned to the treatment and control groups.
The chipmunks and the prairie dogs are randomly selected from their respective habitats.

The average age of the chipmunks in the treatment group is equal to the average age of the prairie dogs in the treatment group, and the average age of the chipmunks in the control group is equal to the average age of the prairie dogs in the control group.

category.subject: Math
category.skill: Evaluating statistical claims: Observational studies and experiments

subject: math
prompt: A certain investment account offers a special interest rate for the first 4 months the account is open followed by a lower interest rate for the remainder of the time the account is open. Akeyla opened one of these accounts with an original account balance of \$700.00 and did not make any other deposits or withdrawals. 4 months after Akeyla opened the account, the balance had increased by 0.6% of the original balance. 6 months after Akeyla opened the account, the balance had increased by an additional 0.1% of the balance at the end of the first 4 months. Every 2 months after the first 6 months, the balance had increased by an additional 0.1% of the balance 2 months before. Which of the following equations could represent the account balance $B(x)$, in dollars, $x$ months after the account was opened, where $x \geq 4$?
questionText: A certain investment account offers a special interest rate for the first 4 months the account is open followed by a lower interest rate for the remainder of the time the account is open. Akeyla opened one of these accounts with an original account balance of \$700.00 and did not make any other deposits or withdrawals. 4 months after Akeyla opened the account, the balance had increased by 0.6% of the original balance. 6 months after Akeyla opened the account, the balance had increased by an additional 0.1% of the balance at the end of the first 4 months. Every 2 months after the first 6 months, the balance had increased by an additional 0.1% of the balance 2 months before. Which of the following equations could represent the account balance $B(x)$, in dollars, $x$ months after the account was opened, where $x \geq 4$?

To the nearest whole number, what is the volume of this firework's shell in cubic centimeters? (1 inch = 2.54 centimeters)

The company's estimated stock price increased \$58 every day after the company went public.

The estimated height, in cm, of the water at the end of the experiment
The estimated change in the height, in cm, of the water each day

prompt: According to a US law, ramps for use by the general public must form an angle with level ground such that $\tan \theta \leq \frac{1}{12}$. If the ramp in the figure conforms to this law and has a height of 28.4 inches, what is the least possible value of $x$, in inches?

subject: math
prompt: The edge length, in inches, of cube Y is $\frac{3}{64}$ the edge length, in inches, of cube X. The surface area, in square inches, of cube Y is $n$ times the surface area, in square inches, of cube X. What is the value of $n$?

prompt: How many solutions does the equation $5x + 3 = 52$ have?

subject: math
prompt:
$r=\sqrt{9w-5}$
The given equation relates the real numbers $r$ and $w$, where $w \gt \frac{5}{9}$. Which equation correctly expresses $w$ in terms of $r$?

subject: math
prompt: For the function f, for every increase of 2 in the value of a, the value of f(a) increases by a factor of c, where c is a constant. Which of the following equivalent forms of function f displays the value of c as the base or the coefficient?
